person

Gordon Amherst

The virologist identified by the Division as the creator of Green Poison.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Role in the outbreak

Amherst is the scientific origin point of the Green Poison plot. Evidence recovered from his apartment connects his research and equipment to the engineered virus. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The official story recap identifies Gordon Amherst, not Vitaly Tchernenko, as the virologist who created Green Poison. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Division Agents investigate Amherst's apartment and discover his equipment and research. [1]

Related records

  • Green Poisoncreator of

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Claims are limited to the official 2020 narrative recap; motive details need direct collectible or mission locators before expansion.
